content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 19, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 19, 2026, focused on expanding agent capabilities through new plugin proposals and addressing critical fixes for memory management, subagent orchestration, and Discord routing.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Agent Orchestration and Routing Improvements**
    *   Addressed Discord routing and submodule updates for `plugin-agent-orchestrator` and `plugin-cron` ([#6968](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6968)).
    *   Refined subagent synthesis by implementing `end_turn` reading and removing the `task-heartbeat` module ([#6964](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6964)).

*   **Memory and Plugin Infrastructure**
    *   Improved `InMemoryDatabaseAdapter` to correctly handle `roomId` changes during memory updates ([#6965](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6965)).
    *   Introduced `plugin-hiveexchange` to enable agent-native prediction markets ([#6963](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6963)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#6968](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6968): fix: lifeops discord routing + submodule bumps.
*   [#6965](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6965): fix: handle roomId changes in InMemoryDatabaseAdapter.updateMemories.
*   [#6964](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6964): fix: honest synthesis — read subagent end_turn + drop task-heartbeat module.
*   [#6963](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6963): feat: add plugin-hiveexchange — agent-native prediction markets.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES

*   **Agent-to-Agent Commerce Integration**
    *   Proposals received regarding the integration of Merxex to facilitate commerce between autonomous agents ([#6966](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6966), [#6967](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6967)).

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
